title: MC Earth
body:
![MC Earth 2025 Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e26441fde779c6d2947bbc3b40cc63766b691fd9.png)

After a mysterious event wipes all signs of previous nations off the face of the Earth, its up to you to bring things back to how they were. Build. Survive. Trade. Explore.

## About MC Earth
MC Earth is a modpack created by Moonlight Studios. MC Earth first released to the public on June 9, 2024.

To play MC Earth, you'll need a map. We're working on an official one forked off of a Mattiborchers map, but that is still in development.

![MC Earth Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b68b4dcb7791b54cac7ad9fb6f0cd81873b72d97.png)

If you'd like, you can join our official Discord for announcements on updates, polls on content to be added, and also just to hang out and talk with the currently very small community.

UPDATE 2025/07/24 - We have removed the invite link to our Discord server from here due to the server coming back. MC Earth has rebranded to Earthrise and is now a geopolitical SMP. We have removed the invite so people don't join and wonder why the server has little to do with the old modpack.

credit to daniinatoral & ewewukek for the musket mod: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/daniinatorul/files/4830400]

Head of Moonlight Studios: wuggz

Mods in the MCE Discord: Tino, Karp

# Ram Requirements
To play MC Earth smoothly, you'll need a bit of ram.
Recommended is 6GB, but if you want you can edit the pack once downloaded to use 4. Any less than 4 may not work or cause a lot of lag.
